questions.question: Produced by brothers Joel and Ethan Coen, this film is based on Homer's legendary poem "The Odyssey" but is set in rural Mississippi.
Discovered on "Star Search" in 1984, this television personality hosted her own daytime talk show from 1996 to 2002 and was a notable cohost on "The View."
This artist's signature song is built around a sample from "Under Pressure" by Queen and David Bowie.
This Jamaican sprinter became a sensation after his performance in the 2008 Olympics®.
Actress Calista Flockhart won a Golden Globe® for her starring role in this series.
